title: dichanthium sericeum subsp. humilius
intro: Dichanthium sericeum subsp. humilius, also known as the dwarf grass or small silky grass, is a type of plant belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dichanthium sericeum subsp. humilius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the plant in water or tea to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
